title: scrophularia pegaea
intro: Scrophularia pegaea, also known as the Alpine figwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of IBS, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a healthy digestive system. Scrophularia pegaea can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
